name: LifePatch Theme (signature title)
role: Front-door identity hook — plays on the title hero behind the 3D internet-economy world; the recurring 'sit down and play' moment.

leitmotif.shape: rise over Am → settle → lift over F → resolve home (restated every 4 bars over the 8-bar harmony cycle)

loop.note: Transport never stops between screens; the lead sequence runs underneath at all times and is opened only by the `title` phase stem gain. No hard cut, no seam.

leadVoice: Tone.Synth (triangle) → tempo-synced FeedbackDelay('8n.', fb 0.26, wet 0.26), volume -11dB. Bright bell-pluck.
intensityLayers: Single static arrangement (the title is not a gameplay morph). Money-Brain `brainGlow` warms warmth+pad a touch for returning players.

cuePoints.reveal: accent('title') fires once on title mount (membrane A1 + Am triad chord + noise swell) as the 3D economy resolves.

transitions.out: Leaving the title (Choose your run) → AppShell sets phase 'menu' on the mode screen — clean stem-gain ramp.

accessibility: Respects global mute (master gain ramp) and is silent until a user gesture starts the engine. Reduced-motion does not silence audio; the user's stored mute preference defaults on under prefers-reduced-motion/data.
originality: Original generic tonal voicings composed for this engine. No transcribed, sampled, or copied melodies/beats/riffs.
license: Original work, in-repo synth. No third-party samples or external sources.

qc.noClipping: buses pre-master at <=0.9; lead -11dB; verify no >0dBFS sum at title
